---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: konkomaji
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages exactly as shown.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Error Log
Check the **Error Log** tab in WPSeoHub and paste any relevant entries here.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Node version: [run `node -v`]
- WPSeoHub version: [shown in sidebar bottom-right]
- WordPress version: [if WP-related]
- Active SEO plugin: [Yoast / RankMath / other]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
